message:
feat(core): add wal_engine.rs — write-ahead log with proptest coverage (ft-283h4.2.1)

Wire up pub mod wal_engine in lib.rs, fix type inference in unit test,
and add 25 proptest properties covering sequence monotonicity, append,
checkpoint, iterators, compaction, truncate, replay, stats, and
cross-function invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
